sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13566" key="a)pore/pw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπορέπω</orth>, <sense id="n13566.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slink away,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.746</biblScope> </bibl>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.</author> </bibl> Rex).</sense> </entryFree>
